app.name: Boulangerie ERP
about.title: About
about.tagline: Complete bakery management software — stock, purchases, production, sales and reports.
about.b1: Accurate real-time stock tracking (raw materials and finished products).
about.b2: Automatic, reliable cost (weighted average cost) and margin calculation.
about.b3: Duplicate protection: no sale or production ever counted twice.
about.b4: Recipe management with automatic stock deduction on each production.
about.b5: Clear financial reports: revenue, expenses, production cost, margin.
about.b6: Low-stock alerts so you never run out.
about.b7: FCFA amounts always correct, rounded to the nearest whole number.
about.b8: Works 100% offline: your data stays on your computer.
about.b9: Automatic daily backup of your data.
about.b10: Bilingual interface (French / English) and role management (administrator / operator).
auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Access your management workspace
auth.name: Full name
auth.emailTaken: An account already exists with this email.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.revenueTip: Sum of sales over the period.
dashboard.expensesTip: Cash out: sum of all purchases over the period, regardless of actual consumption.
dashboard.cogsTip: Sum of production costs frozen at validation for each production of the period.
dashboard.grossMarginTip: Formula: Revenue − Production cost (COGS). Product profitability indicator.
dashboard.chartNote: Revenue and units produced, grouped on the same timezone (Africa/Abidjan). Test records are excluded.
dashboard.methodNote: Profit (Revenue − Expenses) and Gross margin (Revenue − COGS) measure two different realities: the first tracks cash flow, the second tracks product profitability. It is normal for them to differ.
ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.name: Name
ingredients.baseUnitHelp: Fixed and unique: all recipes and movements use this unit (kg/L conversion is automatic for display).
ingredients.cmpNote: The unit cost is the weighted average cost (WAC), recalculated on each purchase and rounded to the nearest FCFA.
products.title: Products & recipes
products.name: Product name
products.recipeWarning: ⚠ {name}: {qty} for a single unit looks disproportionate. Check the unit (g instead of kg?).
purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.deleteBlocked: Stock already consumed in production, deletion impossible.
purchases.deleteInfo: Deletion also removes the linked stock movement and decrements the stock, in the same transaction.
production.title: Production
production.frozenNote: The cost shown here is frozen at validation: it will be identical in History and Reports.
production.noRecipe: This product has no recipe. Define it first in Products.
sales.title: Sales
sales.noStock: No product with available stock. Run a production first.
sales.stockNote: Only products with strictly positive finished stock are offered. A sale only decrements finished product stock.
stock.title: Stock management
stock.totalValueTip: Sum of the displayed table rows: current stock × unit cost (WAC) of each ingredient.
stock.consistencyNote: Summary cards are computed from the displayed table rows — never from a separately cached field.
history.title: History
history.author: Author
reports.title: Reports
reports.expensesTip: Sum of purchases over the period. Cash-flow indicator, never mixed into the margin calculation.
reports.cogsTip: Sum of frozen production costs over the period. The only figure compared to revenue for the margin.
reports.marginTip: (Revenue − COGS) ÷ Revenue × 100. Shows n/a when revenue is zero.
reports.consumptionNote: Aggregated by ingredient identifier (not by displayed name).
db.notReadyHelp: The Supabase connection works, but the tables are not created yet. Run supabase/setup.sql in Supabase (SQL Editor), then retry.
errors.desktopOnly: This version must be launched from the Boulangerie ERP application.
errors.ingredientInUse: Ingredient used in recipes or movements: cannot delete.
errors.productInUse: Product linked to productions or sales: cannot delete.
errors.duplicateRecipeLine: An ingredient can only appear once in the recipe.
errors.stockAlreadyConsumed: Stock already consumed in production, deletion impossible.
errors.insufficientStock: Insufficient stock to run this production.
